description: EFA-1: one body-embedding-conditioned trunk controls a family of bodies. Flow head (actuation, K=1 forward pass) + potential head (verify: low = valid action). Energy-based, deterministic, joules-metered, multi-body — identity NOT measured in tokens or parameter count.
inference: act(body,state,goal): v = flow(feat, a=0, t=0, emb[body]); u = clamp(v[:dof]). verify(body,state,goal,a): potential(feat,a,emb[body]) — lower is more valid.
gate: every body reach_K1>=95 && verify>=90 && bit-exact determinism

certificates.method: one-step contraction sigma_max(P^0.5 J P^-0.5)<1 in the Lyapunov metric of the closed-loop linearization at the measured attractor x*; FD Jacobians, grid-sampled (rigorous route = interval/CROWN); identity-metric contraction fails here (24.5/2.6/0.1% — recorded negative)

one-step contraction sigma_max(P^0.5 J P^-0.5)<1 in the Lyapunov metric of the closed-loop linearization at the measured attractor x*; FD Jacobians, grid-sampled (rigorous route = interval/CROWN); identity-metric contraction fails here (24.5/2.6/0.1% — recorded negative)

one-step contraction sigma_max(P^0.5 J P^-0.5)<1 in the Lyapunov metric of the closed-loop linearization at the measured attractor x*; FD Jacobians, grid-sampled (rigorous route = interval/CROWN); identity-metric contraction fails here (24.5/2.6/0.1% — recorded negative)

agency.policy: L1 flow K=1 -> if E>tau: L2 flow K=4 -> if E>tau: L3 planner tool (two-stage argmin over the model's own potential) -> if E>tau: L4 seeded ES tool; execute argmin-E among candidates; all levels deterministic (bit-exact, verified)

certificates_funnel.method: per-node funnel (LQR-tree-style composition): orbit simulated from EVERY node, certified on entry into the continuous constant-P contraction ball (r=0.76); funnel transient expansion sigma_P(Phi) measured on a ~400-node sample via the FD-Jacobian product (cost, disclosed); node-local and grid-sampled (no between-node claim; rigorous route = orbit tubes via the same product + Lipschitz bound)

per-node funnel (LQR-tree-style composition): orbit simulated from EVERY node, certified on entry into the continuous constant-P contraction ball (r=0.42); funnel transient expansion sigma_P(Phi) measured on a ~400-node sample via the FD-Jacobian product (cost, disclosed); node-local and grid-sampled (no between-node claim; rigorous route = orbit tubes via the same product + Lipschitz bound)

per-node funnel (LQR-tree-style composition): orbit simulated from EVERY node, certified on entry into the continuous constant-P contraction ball (r=0.64); funnel transient expansion sigma_P(Phi) measured on a ~400-node sample via the FD-Jacobian product (cost, disclosed); node-local and grid-sampled (no between-node claim; rigorous route = orbit tubes via the same product + Lipschitz bound)

certificates_multigoal.method: per-goal: attractor + constant-P + RADIAL core certification (200 samples/shell, 0.05 steps) + full-domain funnel entry (3-DOF every-3rd-node, disclosed); node-local grid-sampled limits as certificates_funnel

per-goal: attractor + constant-P + RADIAL core certification (200 samples/shell, 0.05 steps) + full-domain funnel entry (3-DOF every-3rd-node, disclosed); node-local grid-sampled limits as certificates_funnel

per-goal: attractor + constant-P + RADIAL core certification (200 samples/shell, 0.05 steps) + full-domain funnel entry (3-DOF every-3rd-node, disclosed); node-local grid-sampled limits as certificates_funnel

certificates_tube.method: orbit tubes: delta' = (sigma(J)+L*delta)*delta along each node orbit, certified when pnorm(x)+sqrt(lammax(P))*delta <= r_core; L sampled (300 pairs, NOT proven — interval arithmetic named as the rigorous route); nodes sampled 1/1 for cost

orbit tubes: delta' = (sigma(J)+L*delta)*delta along each node orbit, certified when pnorm(x)+sqrt(lammax(P))*delta <= r_core; L sampled (300 pairs, NOT proven — interval arithmetic named as the rigorous route); nodes sampled 1/8 for cost
